response.overview: ‘Screwed Up’ was filmed at The Theatre Royal, East London in Jan 2025.  In his critically acclaimed debut Special (‘No show has made me laugh more’ The Times), Simon rips into celebrity culture, social media, the police, Putin, Prince Andrew and God. Nothing is off limits, including his own mental health, his family and his five arrests. The stand-up comedy tour sold out 170 dates including three nights at London’s iconic Hammersmith Apollo.
response.title: Simon Brodkin: Screwed Up
